heading: Voluntary participation by individuals
label: 300b–2 Voluntary participation by individuals
text: The participation by any individual in any program or portion thereof under this part shall be wholly voluntary and shall not be a prerequisite to eligibility for or receipt of any other service or assistance from, or to participation in, any other program.
